top_signals.title: Here we go again? Assessing the inflation risks of the recent energy shock − speech by Megan Greene
top_signals.summary: Given at University of Derby Business School
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Credit Titans Warn of Shakeout on Deals That ‘Don’t Make Sense’
top_signals.summary: Beneath the surface of buoyant credit markets, a shakeout is building for leveraged deals made years ago, as well as for direct-lending funds that are grappling with an extended period of investor withdrawals.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gulf tensions escalate as Iran hits Kuwait, US strikes near Hormuz
top_signals.summary: CENTCOM said it had carried out a new round of defensive strikes in southern Iran, while an Iranian drone attack on the Kuwait airport killed one person.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cook, The Opportunities and Risks AI Presents for the Economy and Financial System
top_signals.summary: Speech At the Stanford Institute for Economic Policy Research, Stanford University, Stanford, California
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US, NATO allies to launch scaled-back Baltic Sea drills
top_signals.summary: Officials say the smaller footprint reflects operational realities rather than waning commitment.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Agencies remove additional references to reputation risk
top_signals.summary: Agencies remove additional references to reputation risk

top_signals.title: Barr, Measuring Financial Health
top_signals.summary: Speech At EMERGE Financial Health 2026 Scaling Progress, Shaping the Future, Atlanta, Georgia

top_signals.title: Ares CEO Arougheti on Private Credit, Sports Investing
top_signals.summary: Ares Management co-founder and CEO Michael Arougheti says the recent stress in the private credit market is tied to private equity. He speaks with Dani Burger at the Forbes Iconoclast Summit in New York. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Leclerc confirms multi-year extension with Ferrari
top_signals.summary: Charles Leclerc has ⁠raced more times for Ferrari than any other driver in the team's history other than now-retired seven-time ⁠world champion Michael Schumacher.
